settings.body: Toronto-designed seating for boardrooms, lounges, and hospitality spaces. Keilhauer's iconic chairs are in institutional settings across Ontario.
Canadian-made task seating with a 12-year mechanism warranty. The preferred ergonomic chair for OECM buyers — fully adjustable, built for daily institutional use.

settings.hero_subtitle: Commercial seating for Ontario institutions — from ergonomic task chairs to lounge, healthcare, and stacking. OECM-eligible.
settings.intro_text: The right chair changes how people work. Brant Business Interiors carries 16 seating categories — ergonomic task, executive, conference, healthcare, and stacking — with commercial-grade builds designed for institutional environments. All OECM-eligible under Agreement 2025-470. Quote in 1 business day.
